compilation-unit.name: bad-catalog-endpoint
compilation-unit.expected-error: ASX0049: Parameter(s) uri must be specified
ASX1108: External source error. java.net.URISyntaxException: Expected authority at index 7: http://
ASX1108: External source error. missing URI scheme. received: hello
ASX1108: External source error. missing URI scheme. received: 127.0.0.1

compilation-unit.name: missing-source-type
compilation-unit.expected-error: ASX0049: Parameter(s) catalogSource must be specified

compilation-unit.name: catalog-already-exists
compilation-unit.expected-error: ASX1226: A catalog with this name myGlueCatalog already exists

compilation-unit.name: drop-does-not-exist
compilation-unit.expected-error: ASX1227: Cannot find catalog with name myDoesNotExistGlueCatalog

compilation-unit.name: drop-has-dependent-collections
compilation-unit.expected-error: ASX1148: Cannot drop catalog myGlueCatalog being used by collection Default.Default.test

compilation-unit.name: bad-snapshot-format
compilation-unit.expected-error: ASX1108: External source error. unexpected TIMESTAMP snapshot format. Allow formats are: (milliseconds, yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss). Found: Hello!
ASX1108: External source error. unexpected TIMESTAMP snapshot format. Allow formats are: (milliseconds, yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss). Found: 2024-12-12 11:11:11
ASX1108: External source error. unexpected TIMESTAMP snapshot format. Allow formats are: (milliseconds, yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss). Found: Hello!
ASX1108: External source error. unexpected TIMESTAMP snapshot format. Allow formats are: (milliseconds, yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss). Found: 2024-12-12 11:11:11.123
